heading: Loan to place Alaska clean coal technology facility in service
label: 15972 Loan to place Alaska clean coal technology facility in service

children.heading: Borrower
children.label: 1 Borrower
children.text: The term “borrower” means the owner of the clean coal technology plant.

children.heading: Clean coal technology plant
children.label: 2 Clean coal technology plant
children.text: The term “clean coal technology plant” means the plant located near Healy, Alaska, constructed under Department cooperative agreement number DE–FC–22–91PC90544.

children.heading: Cost of a direct loan
children.label: 3 Cost of a direct loan
children.text: The term “cost of a direct loan” has the meaning given the term in .section 661a(5)(B) of title 2

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: b Authorization
children.text: Subject to subsection (c), the Secretary shall use amounts made available under subsection (e) to provide the cost of a direct loan to the borrower for purposes of placing the clean coal technology plant into reliable operation for the generation of electricity.

children.heading: Maximum loan amount
children.label: 1 Maximum loan amount
children.text: The amount of the direct loan provided under subsection (b) shall not exceed $80,000,000.

children.label: A
children.text: the plan of the borrower for placing the clean coal technology plant in reliable operation has a reasonable prospect of success;

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of the loan (when combined with amounts available to the borrower from other sources) will be sufficient to carry out the project; and

children.label: C
children.text: there is a reasonable prospect that the borrower will repay the principal and interest on the loan.

children.heading: Interest; term
children.label: 3 Interest; term
children.text: The direct loan provided under subsection (b) shall bear interest at a rate and for a term that the Secretary determines appropriate, after consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury, taking into account the needs and capacities of the borrower and the prevailing rate of interest for similar loans made by public and private lenders.

children.heading: Additional terms and conditions
children.label: 4 Additional terms and conditions
children.text: The Secretary may require any other terms and conditions that the Secretary determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Use of payments
children.label: d Use of payments
children.text: The Secretary shall retain any payments of principal and interest on the direct loan provided under subsection (b) to support energy research and development activities, to remain available until expended, subject to any other conditions in an applicable appropriations Act.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: e Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to provide the cost of a direct loan under subsection (b).
